hero.mobileSubtitle: Quickly pinpoint weak areas based on your learning trajectory and dive into focused practice.
hero.desktopSubtitle: The Memorix system automatically identifies your knowledge blind spots from your learning history. Through deep academic training, it helps you build outstanding subject mastery and scoring ability within limited time.

memorixDialog.title: Next-Gen Memorix Smart Assessment System
memorixDialog.description: This is not the traditional fixed-interval Memorix review — it's a more advanced, more precise, self-evolving memory algorithm.
memorixDialog.p1: Our Memorix UM1 continuously learns from your real answering trajectory, dynamically fits your forgetting curve, and calculates for each question "when is the optimal time to review" — rather than pushing reviews on a fixed schedule.
memorixDialog.p2: Compared to older approaches, it excels in three dimensions: finer granularity (question-level scheduling), higher precision (individualized parameter iteration), and greater efficiency (prioritizing borderline forgetting points to reduce wasted repetition).
memorixDialog.p3: This is the core purpose of the Memorix Smart Assessment System: using advanced algorithms to concentrate limited study time on the areas that need it most, maximizing score improvement efficiency.

memorix.emptyCurve: Not enough review data yet. Complete a few training rounds and your personalized Memorix fit curve will appear here.
